output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?book ?bookLabel WHERE {
  ?book wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q571 .
  ?book p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 wd:Q10336568 ; pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?date) , "2019"))
  FILTER(?book != wd:Q65083326)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?book rdfs:label ?bookLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?bookLabel) = 'en')
  }
}

- The Night Diary (wd:Q65083326):

Using properties:
- award received (wd:P166 as p/ps), also known as "award", "awarded", "awards", "awards received", "award won", etc.:
  - award or recognition received by a person, organization or creative work
- subclass of (wd:P279 as wdt), also known as "all members of this class also belong to", "category of", "form of", "has superclass", "is a class of", etc.:
  - this item is a subclass (subset) of that item; ALL instances ... is a subclass of mountain; Everest is an instance of mountain
- instance of (wd:P31 as wdt), also known as "example of", "has type", "is a", "is an", "is of type", etc.:

- point in time (wd:P585 as pq), also known as "as of", "at time", "by date", "date", "during", etc.:
  - date something took place, existed or a statement was true; for providing time use the "refine date" property (P4241)
output.answer: The other books that received the Newbery Honor in 2019 besides The Night Diary were Merci Suárez Changes Gears by Meg Medina and The Season of Styx Malone by Kekla Magoon.
